title: lordhowea velleioides
intro: Lordhowea velleioides, also known as Australian tea tree, is a species of plant that belongs to the family Asteraceae. It is native to Australia and is commonly used for its medicinal properties, particularly its essential oil, which has antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant is valued for its health benefits, including its ability to treat wounds, skin infections, and respiratory issues. The essential oil of Lordhowea velleioides can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and creams to harness its medicinal properties.
